title: IZeeXeS's netherite armor
body:
**My netherite armor resourcepack**

There is 2 versioins - [with ears and without it](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/izeexes-netherite-armor/versions) (only third pirson textures replaced)

Overview in gallery - [link](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/izeexes-netherite-armor/gallery)

Installation - drop selected version in your minecraft resourcepacks folder.
